Video.summary: Did you know that Poodles are the second most intelligent dog?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Poodles

Video.summary: Did you know that Spaniels get their name from the breed's origins in Spain?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Spaniels

Video.summary: Did you know puppies are born blind and deaf?!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Puppies

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 70 different species of turtles?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Turtles

Video.summary: Did you know most Corgis don’t have a tail due to evolution?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Corgis

Video.summary: Did you know that a group of young rabbits are called kittens?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Rabbits

Video.summary: Did you know that Beagles were bred for hunting?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Beagle

Video.summary: Did you know Dachshunds were bred to hunt badgers?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Dachshunds

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 350+ different parrot species… far more than we could fit into this episode.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Birds

Video.summary: Did you know that ferrets are used to run wires for houses and buildings?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ferret

Video.summary: Did you know that Llamas were first domesticated 5,000 years ago in Peru?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Farm Animals
